title: Rhythm: code snippet
text: if (x > 0 && y < 10) { return x + y; } else { return 0; } let n = data[i].value; for (i=0; i<n; i++) {}
tips: Spaces around operators: x > 0, not x>0
Brackets, braces, parens all in one paragraph
